targets.rawSql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectA:text}", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectB:text}"

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectA:text}", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectB:text}"

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectA:text}", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectB:text}"

SELECT (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive')) / COUNT(*) END FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectA:text}", (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive')) / COUNT(*) END FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectB:text}"

WITH sev AS (SELECT unnest(ARRAY['critical','high','medium','low']) AS severity) SELECT sev.severity, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND severity = sev.severity AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectA:text}", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND severity = sev.severity AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectB:text}" FROM sev

WITH types AS (SELECT unnest(ARRAY['dependency','secrets','sbom','k8s']) AS subtype, unnest(ARRAY['Dependency','Secrets','SBOM','K8s']) AS label) SELECT types.label AS scan_type, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id=f.scan_id WHERE f.project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND (s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = types.subtype OR (types.subtype='k8s' AND s.tool_name='kubescape')) AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectA:text}", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id=f.scan_id WHERE f.project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND (s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = types.subtype OR (types.subtype='k8s' AND s.tool_name='kubescape')) AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectB:text}" FROM types

SELECT 'Completed Scans' AS metric, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status = 'completed' AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectA:text}", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status = 'completed' AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectB:text}" UNION ALL SELECT 'Images Scanned', (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT config_json->>'target') FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status = 'completed' AND config_json->>'target' IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT config_json->>'target') FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status = 'completed' AND config_json->>'target' IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) UNION ALL SELECT 'Failed Scans', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status = 'failed' AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status = 'failed' AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST))

SELECT 'Fixable' AS category, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'PkgName') FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id=f.scan_id WHERE f.project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') IS NOT NULL AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') != '' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectA:text}", (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'PkgName') FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id=f.scan_id WHERE f.project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') IS NOT NULL AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') != '' AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS "${projectB:text}" UNION ALL SELECT 'No Fix Available', (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'PkgName') FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id=f.scan_id WHERE f.project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND ((f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') IS NULL OR (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') = '') AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'PkgName') FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id=f.scan_id WHERE f.project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND ((f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') IS NULL OR (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') = '') AND f.status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST))

WITH metrics AS ( SELECT 1 AS ord, 'Total Findings' AS metric, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS a, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) AS b UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Open', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'Closed', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Critical (open)', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND severity='critical' AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND severity='critical' AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'High (open)', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND severity='high' AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM findings WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND severity='high' AND status NOT IN ('resolved','accepted','false_positive') AND scan_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'Completed Scans', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status='completed' AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status='completed' AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) UNION ALL SELECT 7, 'Images Scanned', (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT config_json->>'target') FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND status='completed' AND config_json->>'target' IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT config_json->>'target') FROM scans WHERE project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND status='completed' AND config_json->>'target' IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) UNION ALL SELECT 8, 'Fixable Packages', (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'PkgName') FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id=f.scan_id WHERE f.project_id::text = '${projectA:raw}' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') IS NOT NULL AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') != '' AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)), (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.raw_data->>'PkgName') FROM findings f JOIN scans s ON s.id=f.scan_id WHERE f.project_id::text = '${projectB:raw}' AND s.config_json->>'scan_subtype' = 'dependency' AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') IS NOT NULL AND (f.raw_data->>'FixedVersion') != '' AND s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), '')) id FROM scans WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY project_id, COALESCE(config_json->>'scan_subtype',''), tool_name, COALESCE(REGEXP_REPLACE(config_json->>'target', ':[^:/]+$', ''), ''), completed_at DESC NULLS LAST)) ) SELECT metric AS "Metric", a AS "${projectA:text}", b AS "${projectB:text}", (b - a) AS "Δ" FROM metrics ORDER BY ord

list.definition: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC
list.label: Project A
list.name: projectA
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC

list.definition: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC
list.label: Project B
list.name: projectB
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC
